name: Social Network Account Creation Detected
description: The creation of a new social media account has been detected, which might be associated with information operations or other malicious activities.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when the account was created.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user (or identifier) that created the account.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the newly created social media account.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: The social media platform where the account was created (e.g., facebook, twitter).

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: The action that triggered the alert (expected to be 'create_account').
